We use cookies to improve HubSpot’s site. Some cookies are necessary for our website and services to function properly. Other cookies are optional and help personalize your experience, including advertising and analytics. You can consent to all cookies, decline all optional cookies, or manage optional cookies. Without a selection, our default cookie settings will apply. You can change your preferences at any time. To learn more, check out our
Cookie Policy
.

It's context
When your teams and AI work in the same platform as all your customer data, context is your competitive advantage. Marketing is more personal, sales outreach is more insightful, and service issues are resolved faster.

HubSpot’s Smart CRM is the single source of truth that connects all your business data.
Products that connect to everything.
Unify your teams to create content, find leads, close deals, and grow revenue.

Disconnected tools and data slow you down. HubSpot connects everything — and everyone — in one place to make growing a business easier than you think.

Bring Productivity To Life Through Code

Welcome to the HubSpot Developer Documentation. Build custom CRM and data-driven website experiences on HubSpot. Follow the steps below to get started, or jump directly into a quickstart that fits your build.

Authorize your HubSpot account

init

We use cookies to improve HubSpot’s site. Some cookies are necessary for our website and services to function properly. Other cookies are optional and help personalize your experience, including advertising and analytics. You can consent to all cookies, decline all optional cookies, or manage optional cookies. Without a selection, our default cookie settings will apply. You can change your preferences at any time. To learn more, check out our
Cookie Policy

analysis.name: HubSpot
analysis.value_proposition: An all-in-one agentic customer platform unifying marketing, sales, service, content, data, and commerce with native AI across every hub.
analysis.ideal_customer: Growing businesses and scaling teams that want an integrated CRM and go-to-market suite without sacrificing ease of use

features.name: smart crm
features.description: AI-powered, flexible CRM that unifies customer data across all hubs
features.evidence_quote: Smart CRM — AI-powered, flexible CRM software

features.name: marketing hub
features.description: Marketing automation software for lead generation and campaign management
features.evidence_quote: Marketing Hub — Marketing automation software. Free and premium plans

features.name: sales hub
features.description: Sales software for pipeline building, prospecting, and deal closing
features.evidence_quote: Sales Hub — Sales software. Free and premium plans

features.name: service hub
features.description: Customer service software with help desk and AI-assisted support scaling
features.evidence_quote: Service Hub — Customer service software. Free and premium plans

features.name: content hub
features.description: Content marketing software for creating, managing, and distributing content
features.evidence_quote: Content Hub — Content marketing software. Free and premium plans

features.name: data hub
features.description: Data management software for data quality, integration, and governance
features.evidence_quote: Data Hub — Data management software. Free and premium plans

features.name: commerce hub
features.description: CPQ, billing, and payments software for revenue operations within the CRM
features.evidence_quote: Commerce Hub — CPQ, billing, and payments software. Free and premium plans

features.name: breeze ai platform
features.description: Suite of AI agents and features embedded across the entire HubSpot platform
features.evidence_quote: Breeze — AI agents and features that power the entire platform

features.name: ai customer agent
features.description: AI agent that resolves customer support queries autonomously 24/7
features.evidence_quote: Resolve customer queries 24/7 — Scale customer service with an AI customer agent.

features.name: ai prospecting agent
features.description: AI agent that identifies and engages high-value leads automatically
features.evidence_quote: Automate sales prospecting — Identify and engage high-value leads with an AI prospecting agent.

features.name: ai data agent
features.description: AI agent that provides instant natural-language answers about customers from CRM data
features.evidence_quote: Research customers faster — Get instant answers about your customers with an AI data agent.

features.name: content agent
features.description: AI agent specifically for content creation within Content Hub
features.evidence_quote: Content Agent [label in changelog community filters]

features.name: aeo (answer engine optimization)
features.description: Beta tools to track and improve brand visibility in AI-generated search results
features.evidence_quote: AEO (Beta) — Answer engine optimization tools that track and improve your brand's visibility in AI results

features.name: marketing automation
features.description: Visual campaign automation with workflows, triggers, and AI assistance
features.evidence_quote: Automate marketing — Create campaigns with automation and AI.

features.name: lead generation
features.description: Convert website visitors into CRM contacts via forms, landing pages, and tracking
features.evidence_quote: Generate leads — Convert visitors into contacts for your database.

features.name: pipeline management
features.description: Visual deal pipeline for managing and forecasting sales opportunities
features.evidence_quote: Build pipeline — Generate a pipeline of high-quality prospects.

features.name: help desk
features.description: Ticketing-based customer support help desk integrated into CRM
features.evidence_quote: Scale support — Support customers at scale with AI and a help desk.

features.name: customer health scoring
features.description: Score and monitor customer health to identify churn risk and retention opportunities
features.evidence_quote: Health Scoring [label in changelog community filters]

features.name: lead scoring
features.description: Score leads based on behavioral and firmographic attributes to prioritize outreach
features.evidence_quote: Lead Scoring [label in changelog community filters]

features.name: content creation with ai
features.description: AI-assisted content authoring for blogs, emails, and web pages
features.evidence_quote: Create content — Easily craft content for your audience, with help from AI.

features.name: content management
features.description: Organize, update, and distribute content assets from a single platform
features.evidence_quote: Manage content — Organize, update, and distribute content in one place.

features.name: workflows
features.description: Visual no-code workflow automation for marketing, sales, and service processes
features.evidence_quote: Workflows [label and Workflows Library in community changelog]

features.name: custom coded workflows
features.description: Custom JavaScript/Python code actions inside workflow automation steps
features.evidence_quote: Custom coded workflows — Automate actions, trigger workflows, and extend HubSpot logic

features.name: custom action builder
features.description: Low-code tool for building reusable custom automation actions for workflows
features.evidence_quote: Custom action builder — Act on Data in HubSpot

features.name: quotes (cpq)
features.description: Configure, price, and quote tool for sales reps to generate proposals
features.evidence_quote: Quotes [label in changelog community filters]

features.name: billing
features.description: Subscription billing and recurring invoice management within Commerce Hub
features.evidence_quote: Commerce Hub — CPQ, billing, and payments software

features.name: payments
features.description: Native payment processing integrated into quotes and Commerce Hub
features.evidence_quote: Commerce Hub — CPQ, billing, and payments software

features.name: knowledge base
features.description: Self-service customer-facing knowledge base for support deflection
features.evidence_quote: Knowledge Base [label in changelog community filters]

features.name: notifications
features.description: In-app and email notifications for CRM activity, deals, and automation triggers
features.evidence_quote: Notifications [label in changelog community filters]

features.name: ads management
features.description: Manage and track paid ad campaigns directly from HubSpot
features.evidence_quote: Ads [label in changelog community filters]

features.name: ai intelligence
features.description: AI-powered insights and predictive intelligence across CRM data
features.evidence_quote: Intelligence [label in changelog community filters]

features.name: data import/export
features.description: Bulk import and export of CRM data via APIs and file uploads
features.evidence_quote: Import/Export data — Easily migrate data in and out of HubSpot using modern APIs

features.name: crm object sync
features.description: Bi-directional sync of CRM objects between HubSpot and external systems
features.evidence_quote: CRM object sync — Get Data In and Out of HubSpot

features.name: custom crm cards
features.description: Custom UI extension cards that display external data inline on CRM records
features.evidence_quote: Custom cards — Add custom UI elements (like CRM cards) to display your data right inside of HubSpot

features.name: custom calling extensions
features.description: SDK to integrate third-party calling tools directly into HubSpot CRM interface
features.evidence_quote: Custom calling extensions — Visualize Data in HubSpot

features.name: custom channels
features.description: API to connect custom communication channels to HubSpot conversations inbox
features.evidence_quote: Custom channels — Get Data In and Out of HubSpot

features.name: gated website content
features.description: Restrict CMS page or content access based on CRM list membership or properties
features.evidence_quote: Gated website content — Act on Data in HubSpot

features.name: conversations api
features.description: API for building and extending custom messaging and inbox integrations
features.evidence_quote: Conversations API — Act on Data in HubSpot

features.description: npm-installable developer CLI for building, testing, and deploying HubSpot apps
features.evidence_quote: npm install -g @hubspot/cli && hs init

features.name: app settings page (developer)
features.description: Custom settings UI pages for third-party apps built on HubSpot developer platform
features.evidence_quote: App settings page — Visualize Data in HubSpot

features.name: app marketplace
features.description: Curated marketplace of third-party app integrations connectable to HubSpot
features.evidence_quote: HubSpot Marketplace — Connect your favorite apps to HubSpot

features.name: clearbit data enrichment
features.description: Contact and company data enrichment from the acquired Clearbit data network
features.evidence_quote: HubSpot Acquires Clearbit

features.name: small business bundle
features.description: Bundled Starter tier of all HubSpot hubs at a discounted combined price
features.evidence_quote: Small Business Bundle — The Starter edition of each product, built for startups and small businesses

features.name: website templates
features.description: Pre-built CMS website templates for HubSpot-hosted sites
features.evidence_quote: Tools — Website Templates

features.name: academy certifications
features.description: Free online courses and professional certifications for HubSpot and inbound marketing
features.evidence_quote: Academy — Courses & Certifications

features.name: solutions partner directory
features.description: Searchable directory of certified HubSpot implementation and solutions partners
features.evidence_quote: Solutions Directory [in community navigation]

features.name: onboarding services
features.description: Professional guided onboarding service for new HubSpot customers
features.evidence_quote: Services — Onboarding

features.name: customer migration services
features.description: Managed data migration from other platforms into HubSpot
features.evidence_quote: Services — Migration

features.name: strategic consulting
features.description: Expert HubSpot strategy and go-to-market consulting engagements
features.evidence_quote: Services — Strategic Consulting

features.name: technical consulting
features.description: Developer-level consulting for custom HubSpot builds and integrations
features.evidence_quote: Services — Technical Consulting

features.name: customer training
features.description: Structured training programs for HubSpot platform adoption
features.evidence_quote: Services — Customer Training

features.name: api reference
features.description: Comprehensive REST API documentation for all HubSpot platform objects and endpoints
features.evidence_quote: API Reference — Integrate with HubSpot's APIs

integrations: HubSpot App Marketplace (1,000+ listed apps — specific partners not enumerated in scraped source)
differentiators: All-in-one agentic customer platform: marketing, sales, service, content, data, and commerce in a single product
After just one year, HubSpot customers acquire 129% more leads, close 36% more deals, and see a 37% improvement in ticket closure rates
Enterprise power without sacrificing ease of use — positioned against Salesforce complexity
Breeze AI agents natively embedded across every hub, not bolted on
AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) — a novel beta category for tracking brand visibility in AI search results
Permanent free CRM tier with no time limit
Unified data model across all hubs eliminates data silos without third-party CDP

recent_ships.what: AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) beta — tracks brand visibility in AI-generated answers
recent_ships.source: AEO (Beta) — Answer engine optimization tools that track and improve your brand's visibility in AI results [landing nav]

recent_ships.what: Breeze AI agents platform — AI agents powering the entire HubSpot customer platform across all hubs
recent_ships.source: Breeze — AI agents and features that power the entire platform [landing nav + changelog Breeze Library label]

recent_ships.what: AI prospecting agent — autonomous lead identification and engagement
recent_ships.source: Automate sales prospecting — Identify and engage high-value leads with an AI prospecting agent [landing]

recent_ships.what: AI data agent — natural language querying over CRM data
recent_ships.source: Research customers faster — Get instant answers about your customers with an AI data agent [landing]

recent_ships.what: Clearbit acquisition — adds B2B data enrichment and intent signals to the platform

praised: AI adoption approach resonated publicly — 'How HubSpot scaled AI adoption' (71↑ HN)
Leadership transparency and culture — 'Scale-Up Leadership Lessons I've Learned Over 9 Years as HubSpot's CEO' (123↑ HN)
All-in-one platform reduces tool sprawl for growing teams
complaints: Workforce reduction of ~500 jobs (7%) reported, signaling cost pressure (59↑ HN — 'HubSpot to cut 500 jobs')
G2 reviews page blocked — no user review data extractable from provided sources

free_tier.limits: Free HubSpot CRM available; specific seat/contact/storage caps not present in scraped pricing page (content truncated)

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Free HubSpot CRM with basic contact management and limited hub features

tiers.name: Starter / Small Business Bundle
tiers.headline_inclusions: Starter edition of all hubs bundled for startups and small businesses

tiers.name: Professional
tiers.headline_inclusions: Advanced automation, reporting, and customization per hub

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Full platform with advanced permissions, custom objects, SSO, and dedicated support

pricing.notes: Pricing page content was truncated before tier prices rendered — no specific dollar amounts extractable from provided sources. HubSpot prices per hub (Marketing Hub, Sales Hub, etc.) independently, with separate seat or contact-based billing per product. The Small Business Bundle packages all Starter hubs at a combined price. Enterprise is contact-sales.
